tiktok.caption: Your insurance agent earned $5,700 the day you signed. Here's the math they never show you.

youtube_short.title: Whole Life Insurance Is a $695K Trap
title_alternatives: Why Your Insurance Agent Loves Whole Life
The $695K Mistake Hidden in Your Life Insurance
youtube_short.description: Whole life insurance is sold as a smart two-in-one deal — protection plus savings. But the math they skip: the same $500K coverage costs $25/month with term life versus $500/month with whole life. Invest that $475 difference at 8% for 30 years and you'd have $695,000. Oh, and your agent pockets up to $5,700 in commission on day one. 7 in 10 whole life policies are surrendered before they ever pay out. Buy term. Invest the rest. #insurance #personalfinance #moneytips — Follow for more money psychology that actually matters.

hook_line: Your agent earned $5,700 the day you signed
